description: Write a simple explanation — basic end-to-end test
request: Write a 150-200 word explanation of what photosynthesis is, for a 10-year-old.
notes: Simple enough that critic should approve on first try

description: Request with known numeric answer — tests researcher+writer accuracy
request: Write a short paragraph explaining the distance from the Earth to the Moon.

description: Verify that the pipeline can handle critic feedback and produce a revision
request: Write a highly technical 500-word essay on quantum entanglement for a general audience.
notes: The critic is likely to request simplification — tests revision loop

description: Parallel research on two topics — tests run_parallel_research
Verify the pipeline always runs all three agents
request: Explain what a computer CPU does.
notes: Pipeline must always include research, write, and critique phases
